transcript: Albertsons Bakery, home of the hot fresh bread. Can I help you?
Yeah, I'd like to get, uh, into a baguette if I could.
Some kind of baguette or twisted bread. [delayed exhale]
We have some baguettes, yes. Uh, what exactly are you asking?
Like, uhhh... [heavy delay] ...probably, um... challah bread. [delay continues]
Something of that... of that type. [clears throat, high pitched and delayed]
No, can... can you spell it?
Oh, no, no... [laughing] Never mind. We have baguettes, but we do not have woven bread.
[low-pitched] I need... I need... I need, like a... like a woven bread.
You know, like... [low-pitched] ...bread that's woven together.
Yeah, we don't have... we do not have woven bread.
We have baguettes, which are the long, skinny...
...but we do not have woven bread.
So, uhh... I'd like an orange... [low-pitched] donut.
Um... I'm sorry. I can't help you.
I... I'm sorry, I can't help you. Bye bye.
Your call is very important to us. Please stay on the line--
I'm, uh... we're open from nine AM to nine PM.
I really, frankly, I couldn't see... I couldn't make head or tail or whatever of...
It sounded like it... it was a scrambler or somethin' going on...
...'cause we couldn't understand what you were sayin'.
There ya go! Are you havin' fun?
I'd like to talk chewiness, that sounds fun to me.
